nasb.text: and all the foreign people, all the kings of the land of Uz, all the kings of the land of the Philistines (even Ashkelon, Gaza, Ekron and the remnant of Ashdod);

esv.text: and all the mixed tribes among them; all the kings of the land of Uz and all the kings of the land of the Philistines (Ashkelon, Gaza, Ekron, and the remnant of Ashdod);

cnv.text: 並所有外族的人；還有烏斯地的眾王、非利士人之地的眾王，就是亞實基倫、迦薩，以革倫和亞實突餘剩的人的王；

ccb.text: 他们当中所有的外族人，乌斯的众王和统治亚实基伦、迦萨、以革伦以及亚实突余民的非利士众王，
